# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

admin:
  access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/admin_access.log
  bind_address: {}
  bind_port: 8001
  service_bind_address: {}

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          codec_type: AUTO
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: local_service
              domains:
              - '*'
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: '/'
                route:
                  cluster: service-a
              - match:
                  prefix: '/service-b'
                route:
                  cluster: service-b
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.router
  clusters:
  - name: service-a
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: strict_dns
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    hosts:
      - socket_address:
          address: service-a.default.svc.cluster.local
          port_value: 80
    max_requests_per_connection: 100
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
        errors: 50%
        rate: 500
      detection_window: 1m
      enable_circuit_breakers: true
  - name: service-b
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: strict_dns
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    hosts:
      - socket_address:
          address: service-b.default.svc.cluster.local
          port_value: 80
    max_requests_per_connection: 100
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
        errors: 50%
        rate: 500
      detection_window: 1m
      enable_circuit_breakers: true

service_discovery:
  cluster_names:
    - service-a
    - service-b
